title: Truth Report duplicate detector fixed (v2.2.6): methods/dunders excluded, signature required
summary: Fixed in 2.2.6: duplicate cluster detector restricted to top level function/class methods excluded — same name methods across classes are polymorphism , dunders + idiomatic closure names decorator/wrapper/inner/callback
body: Fixed in 2.2.6: duplicate-cluster detector restricted to top-level function/class (methods excluded — same-name methods across classes are polymorphism), dunders + idiomatic closure names (decorator/wrapper/inner/callback) denylisted via TRUTH_DUPLICATE_NAME_DENYLIST, signatureMatch now REQUIRED. 'likely AI-era' tag removed -> '[recently changed]'. Verified on Flask: 11 clusters -> 1 true positive (_make_timedelta in app.py + sansio/app.py). Found via famous-repo content generation.
